query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS system_settings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  settingKey VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE COMMENT '设置键名',
  settingValue TEXT COMMENT '设置值（JSON字符串）',
  description TEXT COMMENT '设置描述',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wfg8FxM46VuY92.2046134b715b --database 5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8 --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS system_settings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  settingKey VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE COMMENT '设置键名',
  settingValue TEXT COMMENT '设置值（JSON字符串）',
  description TEXT COMMENT '设置描述',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
